title: IT Support Executive
description:
An established international energy trading company is seeking an IT Support Executive to provide comprehensive technical support and ensure the smooth operation of its regional IT systems. The successful candidate will play a key role in supporting end users, maintaining IT infrastructure, and assisting with digital initiatives across the organization’s offices.

Reporting to the IT Manager, the incumbent will be working as an independent contributor, responsible for delivering timely and effective technical assistance to business users. He / She will be responsible for the setup, configuration, and maintenance of IT equipment, user accounts, and corporate devices, as well as the administration of Microsoft 365, Intune, and Azure Active Directory environments.

In addition, the IT Support Executive will support the company’s intranet and document management platform on SharePoint Online, ensure proper tracking of IT assets, and assist in implementing cybersecurity measures and compliance practices. He / She will also participate in various IT projects and process improvement initiatives to enhance operational efficiency and digital integration within the organization.

Successful applicants can look forward to working in a dynamic and professional corporate environment that values teamwork, continuous learning, and technology-driven efficiency.

REQUIREMENTS

  • Diploma or Degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field.
  • Minimum 3 years of relevant experience in IT support or system administration, ideally within a multinational or trading environment.
  • Strong working knowledge of Windows 11, Microsoft 365, and basic networking concepts.
  • Hands-on experience with Microsoft Intune, Azure Active Directory, and SharePoint Online is required.
  • Familiarity with iOS device setup, mobile device management (MDM), and endpoint protection tools.
  • Solid understanding of IT security best practices and data protection measures.
  • Excellent troubleshooting, documentation, and communication skills.

Interested applicants kindly use the apply button or send in your application in MS word format to Anson.lim@onyxrecruit.com.sg. (EA: 18C9213 / R21103164)

*We regret that due to potential volume of responses, not all candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
Onyx Singapore is a comprehensive licensed search and recruitment provider established and based in Singapore in 2018.

Leveraging on over a decade of recruitment experience, Onyx Singapore provides contingent and retainer search for mid-to-senior level placement services across various functional disciplines, from Accounting & Finance, Technology, and Corporate Functions.

Our business is built on the deep expertise and experience of professional recruiters in the industry and operating in a structured professional manner to render a smooth and pleasant end-to-end recruitment experience for candidates and clients.
